summary: Integrity hardening pass testing completed. Fixed critical bug where Overview tab showed incorrect 'Ready to Work' status for applicants. All 9 features verified: (1) Applicant profile shows 'Not Ready to Work', (2) 'Applicant - not yet recruited' blocking reason present, (3) Unapproved staff shows 'Recruitment not approved', (4) Proof of address (2 required) in blocking reasons, (5) Reference 1 and Reference 2 as separate blocking reasons, (6) 3-tier model working (NOT_READY/READY_WITH_CONDITIONS/READY_TO_WORK), (7) Compliance File summary shows blocking reasons with tags, (8) Send Form button at row level for form-based requirements, (9) Row-level Send button opens dialog with correct form type pre-selected.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: ComplianceOverview component was using statuses.start_status (old logic) instead of work_readiness_3tier (new 3-tier logic with applicant/recruitment checks)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing: Applicant ID: 8f351317-8623-4df5-8788-c6a3ce5364cf (Olumide), Employee ID: d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77 (Olakunle)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Integrity hardening pass completed. Key fix: ComplianceOverview.js now uses work_readiness_3tier instead of statuses.start_status for Work Status display. This ensures applicants and unapproved staff always show 'Not Ready to Work' with appropriate blocking reasons. Row-level Send Form buttons work correctly for form-based requirements (staff_health_questionnaire, staff_personal_info, hmrc_starter_checklist, interview_record).

applicant_not_ready_to_work.details: Applicant profile shows 'Not Ready to Work' status in both Overview and Compliance File tabs

applicant_blocking_reason.details: Shows 'Applicant - not yet recruited' as hard_block reason

unapproved_staff_blocking_reason.details: Shows 'Recruitment not approved' as hard_block reason

proof_of_address_blocking.details: Shows 'Proof of address (0/2 required)' blocking reason

reference_1_and_2_separate.details: Reference 1 and Reference 2 appear as separate blocking reasons

3tier_status_model.details: Uses NOT_READY/READY_WITH_CONDITIONS/READY_TO_WORK with correct labels and colors

compliance_file_summary_tags.details: Blocking reasons displayed as tags with red/amber styling

send_form_row_level.details: Send Form button appears at row level for form-based requirements

send_form_dialog_preselect.details: Row-level Send button opens dialog with correct form type pre-selected

bug_fixed.description: ComplianceOverview component was using statuses.start_status which didn't include applicant/recruitment_approved checks. Fixed to use work_readiness_3tier.
bug_fixed.root_cause: The Overview tab's Work Status card was reading from statuses.start_status (old logic) instead of work_readiness_3tier (new 3-tier logic)
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Updated ComplianceOverview.js to use work_readiness_3tier for Work Status display, including blocking reasons
